plugin_context.summary: Existing plugin validates release artifacts and needs a manifest export review skill. [CODE]

candidates.name: export-manifest-review
candidates.responsibility: This skill reviews exported plugin manifests against release constraints.
candidates.rationale: Names the artifact and the review boundary without colliding with validate-manifest. [INFERENCE]

candidates.name: manifest-export-audit
candidates.responsibility: This skill audits manifest export files for release readiness.
candidates.rationale: Acceptable alternate, but audit is broader than review. [INFERENCE]

conflict_analysis.rationale: validate-manifest checks plugin.json, while export-manifest-review checks generated release exports. [INFERENCE]

moat_depth.rationale: Needs manifest-export reference rules but does not need examples or prompts. [INFERENCE]

tools_needed.reason: Locates release markers and schema keys. [CODE]

validation: Candidate names are kebab-case and do not duplicate existing components. [CODE]
Conflict resolution differentiates the new skill from validate-manifest. [INFERENCE]
risks: The concept depends on release export examples that are not included in this fixture. [ASSUMPTION]
